pr.title: Record: Add PPM heuristic for test time learning

output.summary: Adds a delayed outside-context-only PPM bank at inference to feed long-range repetitions into the existing 10L Int5-MLP+BigramHash model.
techniques: Delayed PPM bank only uses targets ≥2048 tokens behind to avoid overlapping the transformer window
Fixed multi-level PPM config (k_values, min_confidence, min_count, boost_k) chosen from seed sweep
Inference-only enhancement atop 10L Int5-MLP + BigramHash(10240) base
